system.flavor: Even when winding up a massive attack, you are a menacing force.
system.effect:
Effect sturdy and the following interrupt until the start of your next turn:
  [Shoulder Check — Interrupt 1. Trigger foe in range 1-2 damages you or an ally. Effect foe must save. They are dazed and pushed 1 after the triggering ability resolves. On a failed save the triggering damage is also reduced by 1/2. Heavy may dash up to 3 spaces with unstoppable before triggering this ability. On a failed save, your foe also doubles daze and push.]
